title: melica riograndensis
intro: Melica riograndensis, also known as Rio Grande melic grass, is a perennial grass native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Melica riograndensis include reducing inflammation and soothing skin irritations, as well as supporting respiratory health and immune function. Herbal preparations of Melica riograndensis can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential uses and benefits.
